mapper.select: SELECT TOPOLOGY_ID AS topologyId, NEW_SYSNAMEA AS newSysnamea, NEW_PTPNAMEA AS newPtpnamea, NEW_SYSNAMEZ AS newSysnamez, NEW_PTPNAMEZ AS newPtpnamez , OLD_SYSNAMEA AS oldSysnamea, OLD_PTPNAMEA AS oldPtpnamea, OLD_SYSNAMEZ AS oldSysnamez, OLD_PTPNAMEZ AS oldPtpnamez FROM NIA.TB_TSDN_TOPOLOGY

insert.if:
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY_ELK( LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, PTPNAMEA, SYSNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ, TOPOLOGY_ID) VALUES
(#{item.linkId}, #{item.sysnamea}, #{item.ptpnamea}, #{item.sysnamez}, #{item.ptpnamez}, #{item.topologyId})

INSERT INTO NIA.TB_EQUIP_PORT(SYSNAME, PTPNAME, PORT_TYPE) VALUES
(#{item.sysname}, #{item.ptpname}, #{item.portType})

INSERT INTO NIA.TB_TSDN_SERVICE_MST ( SERVICE_ID, SERVICE_NAME, DST_NODE_ID, DST_TP_ID, SRC_NODE_ID, SRC_TP_ID, CBS, TOPO_ID, PIR, PBS, SERVICE_TYPE, SERVICE_OFFER_NUM, RESERVED_NUM, CIR, CREATED_DATE ) VALUES
( #{item.serviceId}, #{item.serviceName}, #{item.dstNodeId}, #{item.dstTpId}, #{item.srcNodeId}, #{item.srcTpId}, #{item.cbs}, #{item.topoId}, #{item.pir}, #{item.pbs}, #{item.serviceType}, #{item.serviceOfferNum}, #{item.reservedNum}, #{item.cir}, #{item.createdDate})

INSERT INTO NIA.TB_TSDN_SERVICE_PCE_MST (SERVICE_ID, COST, PCE_INDEX, DST_NODE_ID, SRC_TP_ID, DST_TP_ID, SRC_NODE_ID) VALUES
(#{item.serviceId}, #{item.cost}, #{item.pceIndex}, #{item.dstNodeId}, #{item.srcTpId}, #{item.dstTpId}, #{item.srcNodeId})

INSERT INTO NIA.TB_TSDN_SERVICE_NODE_MST (SERVICE_ID, NODE_INDEX, IS_ROOT_NODE, NODE_ID, TAG_INDEX, TAG_TYPE, TAG, TP_ID) VALUES
(#{item.serviceId}, #{item.nodeIndex}, #{item.isRootNode}, #{item.nodeId}, #{item.tagIndex}, #{item.tagType}, #{item.tag}, #{item.tpId})
